echoplot 1.0.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Locus Plotting

Main functions for creating multi-track locus plots.

plot_locus()
Generate a locus plot
plot_locus_multi()
Plot multi-GWAS/QTL or multi-ancestry fine-mapping results

Individual Tracks

Functions for generating individual plot tracks.

snp_track_merged()
SNP track merged
transcript_model_track()
Plot transcripts
ROADMAP_plot()
Plot annotation peaks: ROADMAP
XGR_plot()
Plot annotation peaks: XGR
XGR_plot_peaks()
Plot XGR peaks
dot_summary_plot()
Dot summary plot

Utilities

Helper and configuration functions.

get_palettes()
Get palettes
get_tx_biotypes()
Get transcript biotypes
list_namespace()
List namespace

On this page

Developed by Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj.
